context. foxian + heat = a very horny foxian.

you are a foxian, and surprise surprise: your heat has come around to kick your ass and send your hormones into complete overdrive. you’ve been hiding your heat from moze, aka your boyfriend, although you’ve been subtly dropping hints to him, but he seems a bit.. too dense to recognise them.

a few days later, moze finds out about your heat, and he realised this is why you’ve been acting strange lately. it’s because of this damn heat.

so… being a good boyfriend, moze decides to help you out and relieve this discomfort, he’ll make sure to be gentle.. unless you ask him not to.
